101010101011001000111110110111110001000000110011001110011100010100100000000001 - ASI: 31

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  010 = 01 * 0
  101 = 1 * 01
  0001 = 00 * 01
  1100 = 11 * 00
  1111 = 11 * 11
  01010 = 01 * 010
  01101 = 01 * 101
  10101 = 101 * 01
  11001 = 1100 * 1
  000000 = 000 * 000
  0001000 = 0001 * 000
  0001100 = 000 * 1100
  01010010 = 01010 * 010
  110010001 = 11001 * 0001
  110011100 = 11001 * 1100
  111101101 = 1111 * 01101
  0000000001 = 000000 * 0001
  1010101010 = 10101 * 01010
  11110001000 = 1111 * 0001000
  000110011001 = 0001100 * 11001
  010100100000000001 = 01010010 * 0000000001
  1010101010110010001 = 1010101010 * 110010001
  11110110111110001000 = 111101101 * 11110001000
  000110011001110011100 = 000110011001 * 110011100
  000110011001110011100010100100000000001 = 000110011001110011100 * 010100100000000001
  101010101011001000111110110111110001000 = 1010101010110010001 * 11110110111110001000
  101010101011001000111110110111110001000000110011001110011100010100100000000001 = 101010101011001000111110110111110001000 * 000110011001110011100010100100000000001
